name: lazy-flow
description: Open-source DORA + Flow + PR + Code + Agile metrics platform for Claude Code. Fuses GitHub and Jira into a local-first, fully-transparent delivery intelligence layer that Claude can query directly over SQL.

github_token.title: GitHub Token
github_token.description: Optional. GitHub Personal Access Token or App installation token for GitHub sync. Leave blank to use your locally-authenticated GitHub CLI account (run `gh auth login`); the tool falls back to `gh auth token` automatically. Also honours GH_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN.

jira_oauth_token.title: Jira API Token
jira_oauth_token.description: Jira Cloud API token (create at id.atlassian.com → API tokens). Used with jira_email for Basic auth. Required for Jira sync.

jira_email.title: Jira Account Email
jira_email.description: Atlassian account email for the API token, e.g. you@acme.com. Required alongside the Jira API token.

jira_base_url.title: Jira Base URL
jira_base_url.description: Jira Cloud base URL, e.g. https://acme.atlassian.net. Required for Jira sync.

repos.title: GitHub Repositories
repos.description: Comma-separated list of GitHub repositories to track, e.g. ORG/app,ORG/api. Use ORG/* to track every repo in an organisation (excludes archived repos and forks); wildcards and explicit entries can be mixed, e.g. ORG/*,OTHER/special.

repo_max_idle_days.title: Skip Repos Idle For (days)
repo_max_idle_days.description: For ORG/* wildcards only: skip repos with no push (commit or PR-branch activity) in the last N days, so abandoned repos don't burn API budget or dilute team metrics. Leave blank or 0 to track every repo. Explicitly-listed ORG/name repos are always tracked regardless. Example: 90.

repo_history_days.title: Backfill History Window (days)
repo_history_days.description: On a full backfill, only pull commits and PRs from the last N days per repo, instead of a repo's entire (possibly many-year) history — which wastes API budget and database space and is irrelevant to the metrics window. Default 180. Set to 0 to pull all-time history. Incremental syncs are unaffected. Example: 180.

skip_bot_patches.title: Skip Bot PR Diff Analysis
skip_bot_patches.description: Skip the diff/blob analysis (patch backfill) for bot-authored PRs such as dependabot lockfile bumps — saves GitHub blob-fetch budget and database space with no analytical loss (bots are excluded from per-person metrics and verdicts regardless). Bot commits, PRs and AI-adoption signals are still ingested. Default: on.

jira_projects.title: Jira Project Keys
jira_projects.description: Comma-separated list of Jira project keys to track, e.g. ENG,INFRA
